ariaSpec.usage: The root element of the PanelBar has role tree.
Points to the currently focused item in the PanelBar.
The ul element that wraps child nodes.
Hides the group element from assistive technologies when its parent is not expanded.
The li element rendered for a PanelBar item.
Announces the expanded state of the item (if expandable).
Announces the selected state of the item.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses the previous PanelBar item. If no previous item is available, focuses the last item.
Focuses the next PanelBar item. If no next item is available, focuses the first item.
Collapses an expanded item. If the item is collapsed, focuses its parent.
Expands a collapsed item. If the item is expanded, focuses its first child node.
Moves focus to the first item in the PanelBar without expanding or collapsing an item.
Moves focus to the last item in the PanelBar that is focusable without expanding an item.
Selects the focused item and toggles the item if it is expandable. It also triggers its action (click or opening url).
Selects the focused item and toggles the item if it is expandable. It also triggers its action (click or opening url).
